tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: No other mountain in Europe is higher than Mont Blanc.
The girl is my cousin. Her painting won first prize.
items.transformed: The girl _________ won first prize is my cousin.

items.original: Our new teacher is not as strict as Mr. Kowalski.
items.transformed: Mr. Kowalski is _________ our new teacher.

items.original: The old cinema is the place. My parents met there for the first time.
items.transformed: The old cinema is the place _________ my parents met for the first time.

items.original: As the journey got longer, the children became more restless.
items.transformed: The longer the journey got, _________ children became.

items.original: I have never read such an exciting book before.
items.transformed: It is _________ book I have ever read.
